notes: v1.0.5 — Add-to-Save flow (custom items live in your save without external tools), Export as Single-Item Mod (clean shareable folder mods), Create Custom Item now preserves mod stacks (read from 0058, sentinel writes, in-memory sync). UI refactor: Import/Export/More dropdowns, Reset button, 8-button hero presets grid with God Mode bundle. Per-tab overlay-folder spinners for FieldEdit/SkillTree/MercPets/DropSets. Hex-offset JSON parser. Accessory sockets now included in Enable All. Splash updated. See GitHub release notes for full list.
